module top_module (
	input [10:0] f,
	output [10:0] clear_middle,
	output [10:0] toggle_edges);assign clear_middle = {f[10:6], 1'b0, f[4:0]};
	assign toggle_edges = {~f[10], f[9:1], ~f[0]};
	
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      clear_middle[5] <= 1'b1; toggle_edges[0] <= 1'b0; toggle_edges[10] <= 1'b0;
    end
  end

endmodule
